text: My UPI payment failed but the money has already been deducted from my bank account.
The merchant says they did not receive my payment even though the app showed money debited.
A merchant refunded me three days ago but I still do not see the money in my account.
The seller says refund is completed but nothing has reached my bank yet.
I did not make this UPI payment and I think someone used my account.
I accepted a strange collect request and now money is gone from my account.
My wallet is restricted because KYC is still pending.
I submitted my KYC but the account is still blocked.
I cannot reset my UPI PIN on the app.
My bank account is not linking in the UPI app even though the mobile number is correct.
